q: People eat rice all over the world.
a: There is no place all over the world where people do not eat rice.

q: All the workers in this factory work overtime.
a: There is no worker in this factory who (that) does not work overtime.

q: Every one has to work for a living.
a: There is no one who does not have to work for a living.

q: All the workers in the factory wear helmets.
a: There is no worker in the factory who does not wear a helmet.

q: Every duck can swim.
a: There is no duck that cannot swim.

q: Every school in Myanmar has a computer.
a: There is no school in Myanmar that does not have a computer.

q: Every school in Myanmar now has a multimedia room.
a: There is no school in Myanmar now that does not have a multimedia room.

q: Every family in this building owns a television set.
a: There is no family in this building that does not own a television set.

q: Every student wants to pass the examination with high marks.
a: There is no student who does not want to pass the examination with high marks.

q: All nations in the world have their National Anthems.
a: There is no nation in the world that does not have its National Anthem.

q: Every parent wants his child to be polite.
a: There is no parent who (that) does not want his child to be polite.

q: Every town in Myanmar has at least one high school.
a: There is no town in Myanmar that does not have at least one high school.

q: Every child imitates his elders.
a: There is no child who does not imitate his elders.

q: All the students in Section A are very well-behaved.
a: There is no student in Section A who is not very well-behaved.

q: All mothers want their children to be successful in life.
a: There is no mother who does not want her child/children to be successful in life.

q: Every teacher wants his students to pass the examination.
a: There is no teacher who does not want his students to pass the examination.

q: Every Myanmar woman likes thanakha.
a: There is no Myanmar woman who does not like thanakha.

q: Everyone in our school is helpful.
a: There is no one in our school who is not helpful.

q: Every flower in the National Park looks beautiful.
a: There is no flower in the National Park that does not look beautiful.

q: Every girl wants to look beautiful.
a: There is no girl who does not want to look beautiful.

q: I have studied all the units in my English text.
a: There is no unit in my English text that I have not studied.

q: Every student in our class knows how to work with a computer.
a: There is no student in our class who does not know how to use a computer.
